text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear some excited voices coming from the
academy garden, so I go to check it out.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Basically, we have amaryllises over there! And
then gladioluses, dahlias, and the cherry on
top—hibiscuses!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So they're all red and ostentatious?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! Passion, fire, beauty! Perfect for a
summer-themed flower bed!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's clear that you've put a lot of thought
into this... in your own way. Although it sounds a
tad difficult to put into practice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Special Week, any thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... When I think of summer, I think of
sunflowers.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There were sunflowers near my home when I was
growing up, so personally, I'd like to see some at
the academy too!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, sunflowers... A classic, reliable option.
They may not have the novelty one would want in
a new flower bed, however.
choice_data_list: You're making a new flower bed?
You're making a new flower bed?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Air Groove's trainer! Hello.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That we are. We're just discussing the best plan of
action.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder was meant to be in charge, as she's
the head of the school groundskeeping
committee, but unfortunately—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass came down with a fever yesterday. But she's
sooo responsible, she can't even rest if her work
isn't done!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why we decided to take it off her hands!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the enthusiasm, but we have to settle
the matter, and both of our options have their
pros and cons.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'd like to hear your input, if you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Plain yet achievable, or striking yet difficult? Which option would you favor?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, playing it safe, huh? Sounds about right for
Air Groove's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, sunflowers are emblematic of summer, and
their versatility as decorations is unmatched.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That said, I believe we can still include enough
flashiness in this flower bed to keep you satisfied.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You mean we can use some red flowers?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, let's add some red.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the flower bed meeting reaches a good
stopping point, the group decides to take a
break. Suddenly, Air Groove speaks up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of sunflowers, do either of you know
the famous fable about them?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think I do! My mom told me when I was little!
Ummm, how's it go again?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Once upon a time, there was a girl who fell in love
with the god of the sun. She spent all her time
looking up and following him across the sky, until
one day, she transformed into a flower!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's what my mom told me when I asked her
why sunflowers always follow the sun!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're very well-informed, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Hold up! The girl actually
became a flower?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's not a happy story! It's spooky! And... a
little bit melancólica...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Many interpret it as a tragedy about
heartbreak.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, a different emotion wells up in me when
I hear the fable.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The girl longed for something out of reach. I think
such passion and bravery is admirable.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And I believe that the girl transformed... because
she desired to do so.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She longed to become a flower that resembled
the summer sun she so admired.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The girl's resolve, these proud flowers—I think
there's a certain beauty in them both.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohhh myyy—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's with the strangely in-sync response?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A-Air Groove... I never knew you were...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Such a romantic!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: F-forget everything I just said! All of you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's an order! No objections!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know I already made a suggestion, but I really
like El's idea too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think a colorful, vibrant flower bed would be
really popular with the other students!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oho... So you choose the path of thorns.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd expect nothing less from a fellow associate of
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well—I shall lead us to success.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We will create an enchanting sea of bright-red
flowers at all costs—no matter how difficult it may
prove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
First on the agenda is securing the supplies.
Follow me, everyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Magnífico! What energy! What passion! All hail
the Empress!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh man, it looks like we've really lit a fire in her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh! That reminds me of something.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I heard that when Air Groove runs, the stronger
the opponent and tougher the situation, the more
she smiles!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you mean?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The bigger they are, the harder they fall... and
the sweeter the victoria! She savors finding a
worthy opponent!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That particular smile of hers even has a name...
They call it "The Empress's Savage Smirk"!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh no, Mom... Am I gonna finish this thing
alive?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A completely red flower bed... Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: How exhilarating! I shall relish this challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They seem like they're all having fun, so I decide
to leave them to it.
